text.title: schema-version-pinning Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for schema-version-pinning. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: For every Pydantic model used as a cross-stage contract, declare `schema_version: Literal["vN"] = "vN"` as the first field, persist it on every emitted event, and route consumers via a `dict[str, type[BaseModel]]` parser registry keyed by version.
rule.rationale: Without an in-payload version, schema drift is silent: old consumers parse new payloads and crash on unrelated fields, masking the actual breaking change; with a typed registry, unknown versions raise at the boundary and old data still parses with old code.
